en: Last Sunday saw the U.S. men's hockey team win gold only for this to happen.
ko: 지난 일요일 미국 남자 하키팀이 금메달을 땄는데 이런 일이 벌어졌어.
ja: 先週の日曜、アメリカ男子ホッケーチームが金メダルを獲得し、こんなことが。
zhTW: 上週日美國男子曲棍球隊贏了金牌，然後發生了這件事。
vi: Chu nhat truoc, doi khuc con cau nam My gianh huy chuong vang va chuyen nay xay ra.

en: A wild scene in the locker room, with FBI director Kash Patel even spotted celebrating with the team, appearing to chug a beer before raising the bottle in the air, spraying it across the locker room. -♪ I'm on my way to the game... -♪ -♪ I'm on my way to the game... -♪ -♪ I'm on my way to the game... -♪ Yeah, that is the director of the FBI looking like a little kid who won a prize for collecting the most canned goods and got to go into the locker room.

ja: 更衣室の大騒ぎ。FBI長官カシュ・パテルまで祝杯を上げていた。ビールを一気飲みして瓶を持ち上げた。
zhTW: 更衣室裡的瘋狂場面，FBI局長Kash Patel甚至被看到和球隊一起慶祝，似乎一口喝完啤酒然後舉起瓶子。
vi: Canh tuong dien cuong trong phong thay do, giam doc FBI Kash Patel con duoc thay an mung cung doi, co ve uong can chai bia roi gio len.

ja: 実は一気飲みしてなくて、飲み残しを撒き散らしただけ。一気飲みしたら瓶は空になるから。
zhTW: 而且，值得一提的是，他並沒有一口喝完啤酒然後噴灑到更衣室。成功的一口乾會讓瓶子無法噴灑。
vi: Ngoai ra, anh ta khong uong can bia roi phun khap phong. Neu uong can thi chai se khong con gi de phun.

en: What he basically did there was drink a beer weed and then kind of fling his backwash around.
ko: 그가 한 건 기본적으로 맥주를 마시고 남은 침 섞인 걸 뿌린 거야. 어쨌든
ja: 基本的に彼がやったのは飲み残しを振り撒いただけ。

vi: Co ban la anh ta da uong mot ngum bia roi hat nuoc thua khap noi.

ja: 楽しかったけど、公式にホッケーはもうダメだ。残念ながらいい意味でもない。

vi: Du sao, vui thi vui, nhung chinh thuc la khuc con cau gio te roi, va dang buon la khong phai theo kieu hay.
